<!-- One or two sentences. Which feature/surface does this touch? -->

## How to test

```bash
make up
# steps to see it working, e.g. open http://localhost/<page>
```

## Checklist
- [ ] `make up` still boots cleanly
- [ ] Touched one feature (router in `api/app/routers/` and/or page in `web/src/app/`)
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env` stays local)
- [ ] Updated `api/app/routers/features.py` if a feature went from stub → live
- [ ] Kept it accessible: keyboard-navigable, high contrast, plain language, no autoplay
